title: Random Mob
description: This mod adds a very hardcore minigame to Minecraft! Every 30 seconds, a mob with a random modifier spawns in your world, making the game much harder! Can you beat Minecraft and kill the Ender Dragon with this mod?
body:
**Random Mob** turns vanilla survival into a chaotic challenge run. While the minigame is active, a mob spawns on a timer - each one carrying a random modifier that can help you, hurt you, or completely ruin your day. Your goal: beat Minecraft and kill the Ender Dragon before the chaos wins!

## **How to play**

- /start - begin the minigame
- /stop - end it manually
Kill the Ender Dragon — win the challenge

## **Useful commands**

- /settime - change spawn interval (15 / 30 / 60 / 90 / 120 seconds)
- /disablechatmessage - hide spawn notifications
- /enablechatmessage - show them again
- /modhelp - full command list

Think you can reach the End alive?
**Good luck** - you’ll need it.![Survive until the Ender Dragon...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75c39c9bde0d2719ba85b0c76a7a10905effc7f2.png)
